healthy_description: Large bold violin-shaped deep green leaves. Thick upright stems. Glossy foliage on compact branching structure.

symptom_guide.symptom: Yellowing leaves with soft mushy stems
symptom_guide.visual_description: Lower leaves turn yellow and translucent, stems become soft at base

symptom_guide.symptom: Brown spots with concentric rings on leaves
symptom_guide.visual_description: Small dark lesions scattered on foliage with possible yellow halos

symptom_guide.symptom: Pale yellow stippling with fine webs
symptom_guide.visual_description: Leaves appear washed out and dusty, webbing visible on leaf undersides

symptom_guide.symptom: Sudden leaf drop with no visible damage
symptom_guide.visual_description: Leaves fall off rapidly, usually triggered by drafts, temperature changes, or overwatering
